---
title: "Symposium Schedule"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> When
**Tuesday, May 26** | 9:00 AM (Start)  
**Wednesday, May 27** | 3:30 PM (End)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Where
**University of Calgary** Main Campus, Calgary, AB  
*In-Person Event*
:::

:::

::: {.text-center}
The detailed schedule will follow shortly.
:::
